textByHashes.0ee4973c951762d970aa136d5843db867952257a: I hope this food is worth it. I've got plenty of other things to be doing.
textByHashes.5778d6d8be0a5a65155611f0b17942ca565d9787: Well the main thing is to make sure you're not putting too much salad in. You want there to be twice as much meat as there is salad.
textByHashes.a6ca70908646f3ed004864dfacd144c829c5141e: Well now that we're done here, when am I getting paid?
